title: Add Tasks
description: Add Sales Navigator company search URLs to scrape using the lobstr.io API

content.introduction: Add Sales Navigator company search URLs as tasks to your squid. The scraper will export all companies matching your search filters.

urlFormat.title: URL Format
urlFormat.content:
Use Sales Navigator company search URLs with your desired filters:

`https://www.linkedin.com/sales/search/company?query=(keywords:technology)`

Build your search in Sales Navigator with all desired filters, then copy the URL from your browser.

rows.description: Sales Navigator Companies Search URL containing your search filters

proTips.content: Build your search in Sales Navigator first, apply all filters, then copy the URL to ensure accurate results.
This scraper requires a linked Sales Navigator account. Connect your account in lobstr.io settings first.
Each search URL can return up to 2,500 companies (100 pages × 25 results per page).

seo.title: Add Tasks - Sales Navigator Companies Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Learn how to add Sales Navigator company search URLs to export company data using the lobstr.io API.
